Class CustomPuzzlePane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
pane.CustomPuzzlePane
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class CustomPuzzlePane extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
The CustomPuzzlePane class provides a user interface for managing and creating custom puzzles. It allows users to view a list of existing custom puzzles, remove them, and add new ones by selecting images, setting difficulty levels, and defining answers and hints.

    Represents a container for a selected puzzle image and its associated hint field.

  • Field Details

    • backButtonClicked

      private static Boolean backButtonClicked
      A flag indicating if the back button has been clicked.

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomPuzzlePane

      public CustomPuzzlePane()
      Constructs a new CustomPuzzlePane. Initializes the layout with specific spacing, alignment, and padding, and then displays the list of custom puzzles.

  • Method Details

    • showListView

      private void showListView()
      Displays the view containing the list of existing custom puzzles. This view includes a ListView of puzzle entries, along with buttons to add a new puzzle or remove the selected one.

    • showAddView

      private void showAddView()
      Displays the view for adding a new custom puzzle. This view includes fields for selecting difficulty, entering the answer, choosing multiple images, and providing hints for those images.

    • addImageToGallery

      private void addImageToGallery(javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane gallery, javafx.collections.ObservableList<CustomPuzzlePane.ImageHintBox> items, CustomPuzzlePane.ImageHintBox box)
      Adds an image and its corresponding hint field to the image gallery display. It also sets up a click listener on the image to allow its removal from the gallery.
      Parameters:
      gallery - the FlowPane where the image preview is displayed
      items - the list of CustomPuzzlePane.ImageHintBox objects tracking selected images
      box - the CustomPuzzlePane.ImageHintBox containing the image path and hint field to be added

    • labeled

      private static javafx.scene.layout.VBox labeled(String labelText, javafx.scene.control.Control control)
      Creates a labeled control wrapped in a VBox.
      Parameters:
      labelText - the text to display as a label
      control - the control to be labeled
      Returns:
      a VBox containing the label and the control

    • safeTrim

      private static String safeTrim(String s)
      Safely trims a string, returning an empty string if the input is null.
      Parameters:
      s - the string to trim
      Returns:
      the trimmed string, or an empty string if input was null

    • styleButton

      private void styleButton(javafx.scene.control.Button button)
      Applies a custom graphical style to a button, including background images, hover effects, and font settings.
      Parameters:
      button - the Button to style

    • createBackButton

      private javafx.scene.control.Button createBackButton()
      Creates a "Back" button that returns the user to the title screen.
      Returns:
      a styled Button for navigating back

    • getBackButtonClicked

      public static Boolean getBackButtonClicked()
      Gets the current state of the back button click flag.
      Returns:
      true if the back button was clicked, false otherwise

    • setBackButtonClicked

      public static void setBackButtonClicked(Boolean backButtonClicked)
      Sets the state of the back button click flag.
      Parameters:
      backButtonClicked - the new state of the flag
